info.title: Image Creation
info.description:
This document describes the request and response parameters of the Image Creation API, compatible with BytePlus ModelArk upstream interface.

The unified endpoint is `/byteplus/api/v3/images/generations`, supporting models such as `seedream-5-0-260128`, `seedream-4-5-251128`, and `seedream-4-0-250828`.

post.description: Call the image generation model to generate images from text prompts. Supports text-to-image, image-to-image, and batch sequential generation modes.

value.prompt: A cute corgi running on a grassy field, sunny day, photorealistic style
Convert this image to oil painting style
Place the person from image 1 into the scene of image 2, cinematic lighting
A set of four seasons landscape illustrations

200.description: Successful call, returns image generation results.

error.message: Invalid request body format or illegal field value

401.description: Authentication failed, e.g. missing or invalid token.

429.description: Rate limit triggered or insufficient quota.

error.message: Insufficient account quota, please retry later
Internal processing failed, please retry later

BearerAuth.description: Pass `Authorization: Bearer <token>` in the request header.

model.description:
Image generation model ID. Supported models:

- `seedream-5-0-260128` (latest, recommended)
- `seedream-4-5-251128` (supports 4K with strong text rendering)
- `seedream-4-0-250828` (maintenance mode, most affordable 4K option)

prompt.description: Text prompt for image generation. Supports Chinese and English. Recommended ≤ 300 Chinese characters or ≤ 600 English words. Excessive length may cause the model to overlook details.

oneOf.description: Single reference image URL or Base64 encoded string.
Multiple reference image URLs or Base64 encoded array, up to 14 images.

image.description:
Reference images, used for image-to-image or multi-image fusion. Supports URL or Base64 encoding (format: `data:image/<format>;base64,<encoding>`).

Supported image formats: JPEG, PNG, WEBP, BMP, TIFF, GIF. Per-image minimum dimension > 14 px, file size ≤ 10 MB, total pixels ≤ 6000×6000.

size.description:
Output image size. Two methods (cannot be mixed):

**Method 1**: Resolution description. Values: `2K`, `3K` (5.0 only), or `4K` (5.0 not supported), combined with aspect ratio description in prompt for the model to determine exact pixels.

**Method 2**: Direct pixel specification, e.g. `"2048x2048"`. Total pixels must satisfy model version's range, aspect ratio ∈ [1/16, 16].

response_format.description:
How images are returned in the API response.

- `url`: returns image download link (valid for 24 hours)
- `b64_json`: returns Base64-encoded image data directly

stream.description: Whether to enable streaming output. When set to `true`, the server pushes each image via SSE as it is generated. Only seedream-5-0-lite, seedream-4-5, and seedream-4-0 support streaming. See the 'Streaming Response' documentation for details.

sequential_image_generation.description:
Batch sequential generation switch.

- `auto`: model automatically generates a batch of related images
- `disabled`: generates only a single image

sequential_image_generation_options.description: Batch sequential generation config. Only effective when `sequential_image_generation` is `auto`.

max_images.description: Maximum number of images allowed for this request. Range 1–15. Actual count must also satisfy: input reference images count + output images count ≤ 15.

watermark.description:
Whether to add watermark.

- `true`: adds 'AI Generated' watermark to bottom-right corner
- `false`: no watermark

mode.description:
Prompt optimization mode.

- `standard`: higher quality, longer generation time
- `fast`: faster speed, average quality

data.description: List of generated image information. May contain multiple images in batch sequential generation scenarios.

usage.description: Usage information for the current request.

generated_images.description: Number of images successfully generated (excluding failures). Billing is based on this count.

output_tokens.description: Token count consumed for this generation. Formula: sum(image width × height) / 256, rounded.

total_tokens.description: Total tokens consumed for the current request. Currently equal to output_tokens.

error.description: Error information for this request (if any).

url.description: Image download URL. Returned when `response_format` is `url`. Links are valid for 24 hours, please save promptly.

b64_json.description: Base64 encoded image data. Returned when `response_format` is `b64_json`. No `data:image/...;base64,` prefix.

size.description: Image dimensions in `<width>x<height>` format, e.g. `"2048x2048"`. Only returned by seedream-5.0-lite, seedream-4.5, and seedream-4.0.
